{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323041828967EB9BCC112F6C38317"}"},"total":1633},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7075705621731623714","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"emmm除了直播的那点漏洞之外，其他的我都觉得挺好的，没有太大雷点了，看的还算舒心，女角色也不是恶心人的，出场少。主角有智慧，有三观，理智至上，为人洒脱不拘小节，对文物一视同仁，这就是我心目中收回古董国宝的最佳人选！作者君不要放弃挣扎啊，努力加油吧！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1647441101,"group_id":"7005765788934081577","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"世界很美好，人间不值得！世界没有错，错的是人心！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N75s3p8Hmt0rYHZGcciy1PD32he/HZ5Sw+uVmMYu6dYa","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e66166995538418c812f277b069eb307~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793938&x-signature=xdETBA69pEiflJuZenON98yhhF0%3D","user_id":"1099120241280894","user_name":"贺姐姐啊～"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1099120241280894","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1746228108,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7005765788934081577","book_info":{"abstract":"【直播+鉴宝+系统】
秦砖汉瓦战国玉，唐刀宋画元青花，明清皇陵排排坐！
泱泱大夏，五千年历史浩如烟海长盛不衰，六百年紫禁城珍宝如云！
鉴宝大师叶陵一朝穿越，激活直播鉴宝系统，盘点天下文物。
“宝友，这是玄烨的行书字帖，东西可以，你也很刑！”
“三年到头？做梦呢！这个得五年！”
“宝友你还笑，你那个天启年的龙泉碗更刑，得十年起步啊！”
“叶大师……我也有个东西，你看行不行？”
“刑啊！必须刑！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b6f9ee96941398ea07d38a3fdffff1cd","author":"剑阁执笔","author_id":"","book_id":"7005765788934081577","book_name":"地摊捡漏：开局茶馆对暗号","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8846人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7005767206894043689","read_count":"8846","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1103449"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"527","tags":"都市日常,都市,系统,穿越,直播,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2176b05b71e66c8aa6de8c2db6e3aef7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394708&x-signature=j7vxoKQ02ziUwwCXtdzBx5gqnzM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6977392678","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.6142874e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323041828967EB9BCC112F6C38317"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,
